title: Deadly Detour
overview: When two carloads of friends were headed to Florida the only thing on their minds were sex, booze, drugs, and rock and roll. When a case of engine trouble  sidelines the group in rural Maryland it begins a downward spiral into heinous  acts of killing and depravity. One by one they encounter something in the woods,  an abomination of nature and science. These friends wanted a trip they would never forget and that is exactly what they got when their trip turned into a... Deadly Detour.

trailers.title: Deadly Detour: The Goat Man Murders - An Abomination of Nature and Science!!!
